prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 厦门大学医学类在四川省近四年最低录取位次波动较大：2022年21953名（总计划20人）、2023年7994名（总计划22人）、2024年20827名（总计划13人）、2025年21662名（总计 划6人）。2023年位次大幅上升（数字减小）主要因当年未在四川投放马来西亚分校中医学专业，最低位次由主校区专业决定；2024-2025年马来西亚分校中医学恢复招生，位次回 落至2万左右。2026年医学类总计划增至9人（扩招50%），但招生专业结构发生重大变化——马来西亚分校中医学取消，新增中医学（翔安校区）和医学检验技术（翔安校区），所 有专业均在翔安校区就读，不再有分校专业拉低整体位次。扩招使位次数字趋于增大，但专业结构调整使最低位次趋于大幅上升（数字减小），综合影响下位次将较2025年有所上 升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 厦门大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家『985工程』和『211工程』重点建设高校，入选国家『双一流』建设高校（A类）。学校位于福建省厦门市，综合实力雄厚，医学学科 依托综合性大学优势，在临床医学、药学、公共卫生等领域具有较高办学水平，对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考热门方向，临床医学、口腔医学等专业竞争尤为激烈。厦门大学医学类在四川省招生规模较小（2026年仅9人），专业涵盖理科试验班（生命科学与医 药健康类）、中医学、医学检验技术等。福建省厦门市作为沿海经济发达城市，地域吸引力较强，但距离四川较远，对部分考生存在一定地域权衡因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与招生计划变化，预测2026年厦门大学医学类在四川省最低录取位次约为27661名，较2025年（21662名）位次数字有所增大（竞争相对缓和），主要受扩招50% 及马来西亚分校专业取消双重因素影响。预计录取位次大概率落在27161至28161名之间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Xiamen University's medical programs in Sichuan Province have fluctuated significantly over the past four years: 21,953 in 2022 (total plan 20), 7,994 in 2023 (total plan 22), 20,827 in 2024 (total plan 13), and 21,662 in 2025 (total plan 6). The sharp rise in ranking (decrease in number) in 2023 was mainly due to the absence of the Malaysian campus Traditional Chinese Medicine program in Sichuan that year, with the minimum ranking determined by the main campus programs; in 2024-2025, the Malaysian campus Traditional Chinese Medicine program resumed enrollment, and the ranking fell back to around 20,000. In 2026, the total medical enrollment plan increases to 9 (a 50% expansion), but the structure of enrollment majors undergoes significant changes—the Malaysian campus Traditional Chinese Medicine program is canceled, and new programs including Traditional Chinese Medicine (Xiang'an Campus) and Medical Laboratory Technology (Xiang'an Campus) are added. All programs are now based at the Xiang'an Campus, with no branch campus programs lowering the overall ranking. The expansion tends to increase the ranking number, but the adjustment of major structure tends to significantly raise the minimum ranking (decrease in number). Under the combined effect, the ranking will rise compared to 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and has been selected into the national 'Double First-Class' construction university (Category A). Located in Xiamen City, Fujian Province, the university has strong comprehensive strength. Its medical disciplines, leveraging the advantages of a comprehensive university, have a high level of education in clinical medicine, pharmacy, public health, and other fields, maintaining a sustained appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been popular directions in the college entrance examination, with fierce competition in clinical medicine, stomatology, and other programs. Xiamen University's medical programs have a small enrollment scale in Sichuan Province (only 9 in 2026), covering majors such as Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences and Medical Health), Traditional Chinese Medicine, and Medical Laboratory Technology. Xiamen City, Fujian Province, as a coastal economically developed city, has strong regional appeal, but being far from Sichuan, there are some geographical trade-offs for some candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the supply-demand elasticity model and changes in enrollment plans, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Xiamen University's medical programs in Sichuan Province in 2026 will be approximately 27,661, an increase in ranking number (relatively less competitive) compared to 2025 (21,662), mainly due to the dual effects of a 50% enrollment expansion and the cancellation of the Malaysian campus program. The admission ranking is expected to fall within the range of 27,161 to 28,161.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences and Medical Health)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Traditional Chinese Medicine (Xiang'an Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety.
